mechanism: Each landing zone is provisioned with its own VNet, identity, monitoring, and automation runtime. No platform capability is shared between landing zones.
why: Sharing infrastructure between landing zones couples their lifecycles — one team's change or outage can block another.

related.note: Single resource group contains all self-contained capabilities.
Each landing zone gets its own identity.
Self-contained capabilities are consumption-based — no idle cost.
Subscription reuse requires the subscription to be empty — residual resources violate self-containment.
Dedicated Log Analytics workspace per landing zone.
deleteAll guarantees decommissioning leaves no residual state.
No central registry couples landing zones — discovery by prefix.

violations: Landing zone sharing a Key Vault or storage account with another landing zone.
